hero.eyebrow: For jewellery retail · For the stores that hold the moments
hero.sub: Your customer tries every piece on her own photo. Shortlists her favourites. Shares them on WhatsApp. Her family decides. She comes back to buy.
section1.title: She'll pick up seven pieces. She'll try two.
section1.sub: The rest stay in the tray — unseen, un-tried, undecided. Dikhao gives her a mirror that never puts anything back.
section2.title: Three steps. No learning curve.
step1.label: One
step1.title: Seat your customer. Take one bust photo.
step1.desc: Forty seconds, any tablet. She keeps this photo — the app reuses it for every try-on, every visit.
step2.label: Two
step2.title: Let her browse your catalogue.
step2.desc: Your full collection — tagged, searchable, sortable by price — on the tablet in front of her. She taps what she likes.
step3.label: Three
step3.title: She sees herself wearing it. Instantly.
step3.desc: AI places the piece on her own face and neck in under fifteen seconds. She shortlists favourites. Her shortlist goes to her WhatsApp.
showcase.title: What she can try, starting day one.
showcase.sub: We begin with bust-shot jewellery — the pieces she'll linger on. Bangles, rings, and anklets follow in phase two.
form.title: Join the Dikhao waitlist.
form.sub: We're piloting with 50 jewellery shops across India. Share your details — we'll WhatsApp you the moment a slot opens in your city.
stats.scarcity: Only 50 pilot slots — request yours now.
form.successSub: We'll WhatsApp you the moment we open a pilot slot in your city.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.privacy: We only use your number to let you know when the pilot opens. Nothing else.
footer.blurb: A quiet tool for a loud moment — the moment she decides.
